response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ requirement, with strong recent exposure to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at top-tier companies including current AI-agent infrastructure work at Google. Background covers required databases (MongoDB, MySQL), Docker/Kubernetes, multiple languages, and a clear track record of testing/TDD advocacy. Gaps exist around Nest.js and Vitest specifically, and no explicit Kotlin experience, but the depth of fullstack and AI-agent work strongly compensates.
strengths: Recent AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at Google directly matches a required skill
Deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB across Meta, RIDE, and Google
Strong testing culture — TDD practitioner, workshop creator, built own test runner (Trial) and assertions library
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest (primary stack frameworks)
No Kotlin experience listed; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Significant career focus on DLang may signal less alignment with mainstream enterprise TS/Java tooling

key_factors.factor: AI-agent and MCP experience at Google
Depth of TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack track record
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin on the primary/secondary stack
